text: arXiv 2606.19313v1. Equation S=∑_k a_k X_k. Matched concepts: Variable, Equality, Addition. Variable means a Variable is a mathematical concept used as a named object, value, or quantity in formal mathematical discourse. Equality means an Equality is a mathematical relation that specifies how two or more mathematical objects are connected. Addition means an Addition is a mathematical operation or operator that transforms one or more inputs into a result.
